originalTitle: Running a software jam in a world of slop
content: I'm Fox. I'm a 16 year old, and I've been working mostly working on making projects I thought were cool & would do well on the internet over the last year. You can check out my other blog posts if you want to get a sense of what that means: https://foxmoss.com/blog >. Hack Club noticed these projects and thought I would be well suited to run an event. This was my reaction, I wanted to make something that could encourage the same competition as well the feedback I get from places like HN and appreciate well made projects. Hack Club does a good job at throwing money at people who make projects, but a iffy job at rewarding hard work. I wanted to change that. Radish Jam https://radish.hackclub.com/ > was my reaction to that, and this blog post goes through my thought processes in logistics. How something similar could be run again either by another Hack Clubber or an adult looking to run something for similar for adults :)
chineseTitle: 在泥泞的世界中运行软件堵塞
chineseContent: 我是狐狸。我今年 16 岁，去年我主要致力于制作我认为很酷并且会在互联网上表现出色的项目。如果您想了解这意味着什么，可以查看我的其他博客文章：https://foxmoss.com/blog >。 Hack Club 注意到了这些项目，并认为我非常适合举办活动。这是我的反应，我想做一些可以鼓励同样竞争的东西，以及我从 HN 等地方得到的反馈，并欣赏制作精良的项目。 Hack Club 在向项目开发者提供资金方面做得很好，但在奖励辛勤工作方面却表现不佳。我想改变这一点。萝卜果酱 https://radish.hackclub.com/> 是我对此的反应，这篇博文回顾了我在物流方面的思考过程。如何由另一个黑客俱乐部成员或希望为成人运行类似内容的成年人再次运行类似的内容:)
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
